locations.name: 比亞克島
locations.summary: 比亚克岛亦作韋亞克島（Wiak Islands），印度尼西亞官方語作Pulau Biak。 印度尼西亞巴布亞北部海岸外斯考滕群島（Schouten Islands）的最大島嶼。属于巴布亚省比亚克农福尔县。位於极乐鸟湾入口處。島長72公里（…

relations.subject: Biak myzomela
relations.evidence: It was formerly considered a subspecies of the dusky myzomela ( Myzomela obscura), but was split as a distinct species by the IOC in 2021. It is found in Biak
